subject: fix: full branch audit — 6 bugs and dead code across components, hooks, scripts
body:
Full diff audit of all 63 files changed on this branch (not just debug
system commits). Found and fixed:

1. BurgerMenu.jsx: ArrowUp off-by-one when focus is outside button list.
   idx=-1 computed (length-2) instead of (length-1). Added idx===-1 guard
   to go to last item, matching ArrowDown which already goes to first.

2. BottomSheet.jsx: handleTouchEnd called snapToNearest on every touchend,
   including content taps that were never promoted to a sheet drag. Added
   isDragging guard to skip snap logic for non-drag touches.

3. useAdState.js: Dead getPageCount function — defined and exported but
   never destructured or called (App.jsx uses pages.length directly).
   Removed function and export.

4. useDarkMode.js: comboId in useEffect dep array was redundant (activeTheme
   is derived from comboId + isDark). Caused effect to fire twice per combo
   change, double-logging 'theme-applied'. Moved comboId to ref for logging,
   removed from deps.

5. generate-theme-meta.mjs: Dead comboMapStr variable — built with
   JSON.stringify + replace but never used. Line 159 uses
   JSON.stringify(comboMap) directly. Removed.

6. oklchToHex.mjs: L normalization heuristic (L > 1) couldn't distinguish
   oklch(1% ...) from oklch(1 ...). Regex now captures % sign in a group
   and uses it to decide normalization instead of the boundary-ambiguous
   heuristic.

Tags: bugfix, cleanup, a11y, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branch-audit
Semver: patch
